home.hero_subtitle: Professional tattoo studio in the heart of Playa del Carmen. We transform your stories into eternal works of art.
home.services_title: We Create Art That Lasts Forever
home.services_tattoos_desc: From minimalist designs to elaborate pieces. Every tattoo is a unique work created for your story.
home.services_piercings_desc: Performed with the highest quality materials and professional technique for your comfort and safety.
home.about_title: More Than a Studio, an Experience
home.about_desc1: Kim Tattoo was born from a deep passion for body art. With over 10 years of experience, we have turned every session into a ritual of personal transformation.
home.about_desc2: We work with the highest hygiene standards and use premium inks to guarantee results that last.
home.testimonial_1_text: Kim transformed my idea into something far more beautiful than I imagined. The detail and dedication are unmatched.
home.testimonial_2_text: The studio atmosphere makes you feel safe and in good hands from the very first moment.
home.testimonial_3_text: I’ve had three tattoos done by Kim and each one surpasses the last. It’s hard to go anywhere else.
home.final_cta_desc: Contact us on WhatsApp and share your idea. We guide you through every step of the process.

footer.tagline: More than a studio, an artistic experience dedicated to personal expression and technical excellence.
